rawMcpTools.reason: Raw tool and scheme rows were captured with command evidence.

oqlSearch.reason: OQL/search rows include evidence and continuation checks.

quickCli.reason: Quick command lanes have raw stdout/stderr artifacts.

flowQuality.reason: Rows are grouped into benchmark flows with pass/warn/fail status.

dataQuality.reason: Raw outputs and command ledgers are preserved for replay.

researchQuality.reason: Rows distinguish proof, partial evidence, and continuation quality.

outputQuality.reason: Required README, reflection, ratings, commands, and raw artifacts are present.

remoteAsLocal.reason: Remote-as-local rows are represented when present in the run.
